name: Ryan Baumann
role: Head of Developer Experience, Google Maps Platform
headline: Developer experience is a growth engine, not a support function.
thesis: I build developer platforms backwards from growth: start with real adoption and revenue goals, then ship the product, context, and ecosystem work that moves them. That goes well beyond docs, code samples, and DevRel — it's platform engineering, product, and business development working as one system. Today that means making AI agents first-class users of Google Maps Platform.
description: Ryan Baumann — Head of Developer Experience at Google Maps Platform. Product and engineering leader building developer platforms backwards from growth, with 15+ years across Google, Mapbox, and Instabase.
aboutTeaser: 15+ years scaling developer platforms at Google, Mapbox, and Instabase — as a builder, platform engineering leader, and product leader. Before that: launching industrial IoT at Caterpillar (3 patents) and racing bikes professionally.

sectionIntros.work: Selected platform, product, and growth work. Each entry starts from the goal it served — adoption, revenue, reach — and shows what shipped.
sectionIntros.writing: Notes on developer experience as a growth discipline, applied AI, and building platforms agents can use. Long-form posts live here; the weekly cadence lives on LinkedIn.
sectionIntros.talks: Talks, videos, and decks. I present demo-first: working product over slides, then how it's built, then why it matters to the business.
